data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Spotify encrypts user data in transit to protect privacy.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS/SSL protocols for secure communications.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control policies to limit access to critical data.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control (RBAC) ensuring only authorized access.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Continuous monitoring for suspicious activities and anomalies.
data.technical_spec: Implements SIEM systems for real-time analysis.

data.title: Patch Management
data.description: Regular updates and patches to fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management systems in place for rapid response.

data.title: Data Breach Response
data.description: Comprehensive strategy for handling data breaches promptly.
data.technical_spec: Incident response teams and predefined processes to mitigate damage.
